basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Research Associate III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Research Associate III Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Research Associate III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per Government of India guidelines

qualification.education_qualification: MD / MS / MPH/ MDS from NMC / NDC recognized medical / dental college with experience in conducting systematic reviews and meta-analysis as demonstrated by certified training and at least 02 published systematic reviews as the first or corresponding author in MEDLINE indexed journals.
qualification.details: MD / MS / MPH/ MDS from NMC / NDC recognized medical / dental college with experience in conducting systematic reviews and meta-analysis as demonstrated by certified training and at least 02 published systematic reviews as the first or corresponding author in MEDLINE indexed journals.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Delhi Research Associate III Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Research Associate III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Research Associate III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Research Associate III position at AIIMS Delhi is 15th July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate III post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MD / MS / MPH/ MDS from an NMC / NDC recognized medical / dental college. Additionally, experience in systematic reviews and meta-analysis with published work is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate III position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Research Associate III post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate III role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate III position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 67,000, along with Rs. 20,100 as HRA.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate III post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the Research Associate III position in this recruitment drive announced by AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Delhi Research Associate III recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by a personal discussion or interview to assess their suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Research Associate III position at AIIMS Delhi is a contractual job. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the contract.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the AIIMS Delhi located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029. Candidates from Delhi and surrounding regions are encouraged to apply.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: While the notification specifies applications from eligible candidates in Delhi, it is advisable to check the official notification for any specific state-wise restrictions or preferences.
